description.short: Browser automation, code execution, and memory in cloud sandboxes
description.full: Ranger is a Scout-alternative Copilot Cowork plugin that provides browser automation, code execution, document generation, persistent memory, and scheduled automations — all running in isolated Azure Container Apps Sandbox microVMs. Navigate any website with Playwright, execute Python/bash/.NET code, generate Word/Excel/PowerPoint documents, remember user preferences, and schedule recurring tasks. Pair with Work IQ servers (Mail, Calendar, Teams, OneDrive, SharePoint) for full Microsoft 365 integration at a fraction of Scout's cost using existing M365 Copilot credits.

agentConnectors.description: Browser automation, code execution, document generation, memory, and automations via ACA Sandboxes
